title: sedum × derbezii
intro: Sedum × derbezii is a hybrid succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family, derived from the cross between Sedum dendroideum and Sedum glaucophyllum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily containing sedum alkaloids and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sedum × derbezii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a sought-after ingredient in traditional medicine. Sedum × derbezii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
